ruby.title: Probability Analysis
ruby.insight: Model placed wedonttellthetruth (ire) at position 2 (20.0% probability) vs top pick Corduroy (22.0%). Underestimated winning horse by ~2.0 percentage points.

keenan.title: Forecast & Distribution
keenan.insight: Top forecast prediction was Corduroy > Wedonttellthetruth (IRE), but actual result was Wedonttellthetruth (IRE) > Crown Inn To Win (IRE). Distribution model underestimated variance in placing combinations.

mordin.title: Market Alignment
mordin.insight: Winner Wedonttellthetruth (IRE) had well-aligned model/market values (divergence 1.8%). Market pricing efficient for this outcome.
